# Slither

## Effect

When you draw this card, randomize its cost from 0 to 3.

## Sources And Targets

| Source | Source type | Target |
|---|---|---|
| Wood Carvings | Event: Overgrowth | 1 card |

## Notes

- Cards can only have one enchantment.
